title: Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple
tagline: Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Ambalappuzha Sree Krishna Swamy Temple is an Indian Hindu temple dedicated to Krishna at Ambalappuzha in Alappuzha district of Kerala.
overview.description: Ambalappuzha Sree Krishna Swamy Temple is an Indian Hindu temple dedicated to Krishna at Ambalappuzha in Alappuzha district of Kerala. The temple is believed to have been built during 15th century CE by the local ruler Chembakasserry Pooradam Thirunal-Devanarayanan Thampuran. It is one of the seven greatest temples in Travancore. It is considered one among the 108 Abhimana Kshethram of Vaishnavate tradition.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Alappuzha East
topPlaces.description: Alappuzha East is a village in Alappuzha district in the state of Kerala, India. It is part of Alappuzha municipality.

topPlaces.name: Ambalappuzha
topPlaces.description: Ambalappuzha is a small town in the Alappuzha district of Kerala state, India. It is located 14 km (8.7 mi) south of Alappuzha which is the district headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Karumady
topPlaces.description: Karumady is a village three km east of Ambalappuzha in Alappuzha district of the Indian state of Kerala. It is famous for Karumady Kuttan, the eleventh century black granite statue of Sri Buddha.

topPlaces.name: Sree Venu Gopala Swamy, Purakkad
topPlaces.description: Sree Venu Gopala Swamy Temple, Purakkad is one of the oldest Gowda Saraswath temples in the world. The main deity is Sree Venu Gopala Swamy.

topPlaces.name: Vaisyambhagom
topPlaces.description: Vaisyambhagom is a village in Kuttanadu Taluk in Alleppey District in Kerala. River Pookaitha, a branch of River Pamba flows on the north and west side of the village.

topPlaces.name: Thakazhy Sree Dharma Sastha Temple
topPlaces.description: Thakazhy Sree Dharma Sastha Temple is six kilometers from Ambalapuzha at Thakazhy in Alappuzha district, Kerala in India. The presiding deity is Shasthavu (Lord Ayyappan) who faces east.

topPlaces.name: Thakazhy
topPlaces.description: Thakazhy is a village in the Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is part of the Kuttanad region which is bound by the backwaters and located on the banks of the River Pamba.

topPlaces.name: Kunnumma
topPlaces.description: Kunnumma is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (86 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ambalappuzha Sri Krishna Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Alappuzha East, Ambalappuzha, Karumady, Sree Venu Gopala Swamy, Purakkad, Vaisyambhagom.
